title: Fighter Villagers
description: Adds Fighter Villagers whom can follow you and use weapons and armor, as well as gain levels to upgrade skills.
body:
# Fighter Villagers
This mod adds a fighter type villager to the game, acting as your personal guards similar to dogs. The mod aims to feel like a vanilla extension of Minecraft.

Mod is still in development, expect a few bugs.

## Features
- They can become a fighter by placing down an armor stand near the villager. 
- Once the villager is a fighter you can make them follow you up to 5 at a time.
- You can increase their health stats by giving them golden apples or leveling them up by fighting mobs, or level them up by giving them XP bottles.
- Each level-up gains Skill Points which can be used to purchase upgrades for the villager.
- They have advanced movement mechanics allowing them to parkour rough terrain such as jumping over lava blocking the path or climbing ladders and water.
- Fighter villagers will help defend villages while not following the player.
- They will attack any mobs attacked by the player.

Best used with Fresh Animations.

## Planned features
- ~~Improved Movement: climbing ladders & water~~
- ~~Skill Tree: Ability to upgrade custom skills using level points~~
- Combat: ~~Improve enemy targeting~~, automatically equip best weapon from inventory, ~~swing sword during attack~~
- Skin: Improve fighter villager texture
- Level System: ~~Level points for skills, better progression~~, different appearence when certain level is reached
- Open source once the project is done and code is clean
- Multiplayer support
- Support more MC versions
- Add more skill upgrades

## Known issues
- Villagers can get stuck in water
- Villagers sometimes make random 360s
- Villagers sometimes get unloaded or disappear from the party
- They cannot help fighting the ender dragon
- Villagers might equip a native role as well as the fighter role (doesn't seem to break anything and might actually be useful for waiting villagers)
- The skill tree menu zoom might go beyond its limit



Note:

AI generated code was used during the creation of this mod.
